routerBearerAuth.description: Per-deployment ArcLink LLM router key. Raw keys are materialized only into ArcPods and are never returned by provider-state APIs.

sessionAuth.description: Session-based auth via cookies or headers.
sessionAuth.name: X-ArcLink-Session-Id

shareRequestBrokerAuth.description: Deployment-scoped Drive/Code share-request broker token. Token material is stored only in ArcPod runtime secrets; the hosted API stores and verifies only a hash.
shareRequestBrokerAuth.name: X-ArcLink-Share-Request-Broker-Token

info.description: ArcLink self-serve AI deployment platform API.
